name: taskagent-cursor
description: Cursor plugin for tupical/daruma. Registers the taskagent MCP server in Cursor (~/.cursor/mcp.json) via one-click deeplink or CLI, and ships Cursor Rules that teach the agent how to drive parse/decompose/plan/execute.
author: tupical

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "Release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "Release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "Release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
